title: Claude Fable 5 designs a 3D-printable model in a Claude-built CAD editor
summary: Claude Fable 5 created a browser-based CAD editor that can design 3D-printable models. The editor includes a built-in AI copilot also created by Fable 5 to assist with modeling tasks.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 designing a complete 3D-printable model inside a browser-based CAD editor that Fable 5 itself built. The editor ships with a built-in AI copilot that assists with the modeling work. It demonstrates a closed loop where the same model both builds the tool and uses it: generating the CAD application, then operating within it to produce a printable part.
